name: approval-flow
title: Approval Flow
description: A focused example that guards one write with an exact approval grant.

notes: Replace the example return value with transactional grant consumption and job enqueueing.
Pair this server example with a decision surface that exposes action and impact.

documentation.whenToUse: Use to understand the handoff between an approval grant and queued execution.
documentation.whenNotToUse: Do not copy it as a persistence or authorization system without a transactional store.
tradeoffs: The example leaves transactional persistence to the host application.
